name: Matter / engagement
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The unit of client work to which time, disbursements and fees attach.

name: WIP (unbilled time)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Recorded professional time not yet billed to the client.

name: Fee note
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The professional invoice for fees and recoverable disbursements.

name: Disbursement
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A cost incurred on the client's behalf, recoverable on the fee note.

name: Retainer
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: An advance held against future fees; statutory trust rules for client money are a declared research gap.

name: Practising certificate
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The annual authority to practise issued by a professional council; regimes are declared research gaps.

name: Conflict check
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Screening a new engagement against existing clients and matters before acceptance.

name: Realisation
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Billed fees as a share of the standard value of time recorded.
